commitResults.messageBody:
- Implemented `dispenselog` command to display a summary of all medications dispensed on a given date.
- Automatically records dispense events in `DispenseLog` after each successful `dispense` command.
- Persisted the log to `data/dispense_log.txt` for session continuity.
- Added `DispenseRecord` and `DispenseLog` classes for managing dispense records.
- Updated `Inventory`, `Storage`, `Ui`, and `PharmaTrackerParser` to support the new feature.
- Created `DispenseSummaryCommand` to handle the retrieval and display of dispense records.
- Added unit tests for `DispenseSummaryCommand` to ensure correct functionality.
